tour.title: Settings tour
tour.content: Quick walk through the controls that matter most on first setup. You can re-run any time from the ? button.

tour.title: DLC folder
tour.content: Point Slopsmith at your Rocksmith 2014 DLC folder. PSARCs and sloppaks here become your library. Hit Save after changing.

tour.title: Default arrangement
tour.content: Which arrangement to land on when a song loads — Lead, Rhythm, Bass, or Auto (pick whatever the song has).

tour.title: A/V sync offset
tour.content: Shift audio against the note highway in milliseconds. Use the note_detect plugin's auto-calibrate (or [ / ] keys in the player) to dial it in.

tour.title: Rescan library
tour.content: Picks up new songs you've dropped into the DLC folder. Full Rescan rebuilds metadata from scratch — slower, only needed after upgrades or corruption.

tour.title: Backup and restore
tour.content: Export bundles your core settings plus every plugin's opt-in state into a single file. Import on a fresh install to migrate. Plugin authors declare what gets included via settings.server_files.

tour.title: Export Diagnostics
tour.content: Builds a troubleshooting bundle (system info, logs, plugin diagnostics) for bug reports. Use the checkboxes above to control what's included; Redact strips paths and identifiers.

tour.title: Per-plugin settings
tour.content: Every installed plugin with its own settings shows up here as a collapsible section. Plugin updates are surfaced at the top of this block.

tour.title: About
tour.content: Version, source code, and license. Slopsmith is AGPL-3.0 — if you fork it, the source has to stay open.

tour.title: Done
tour.content: Plugins ship their own tours too — the ? button surfaces whichever ones apply to the current screen.
